description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark metal, featuring ornate details near the breech and muzzle. The wooden carriage is robust, constructed from thick planks, and reinforced with metal brackets and bolts. The wheels are also wooden, with metal bands for durability, and are attached to the carriage with visible axles. The cannon is equipped with side trunnions for mounting and aiming, and there are metal rings and hooks for maneuvering or securing the piece. The overall appearance suggests a heavy, durable weapon designed for stationary use in defensive or offensive operations.
description: A large, ornate metal cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden carriage with four wheels and metal reinforcements. The design is robust, with detailed barrel engravings and functional mounting hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the four wheels beneath the wooden carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage structure, and the mounting hardware including trunnions and axles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the breech of the cannon, the back of the carriage, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the length of the barrel, carriage details, and wheel arrangement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage and barrel are exposed with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the cannon and carriage are finished in solid dark and wood tones.
